Demerits of Sun's longitude method
I) Sage support for this method is doubtful.
2) One of the methods discussed in the sloka contradicts with
navamsa-dwadasamsa method.
7. Khati-Vikhati at birth time and BT rectification
The concept here is that "The Khati-vikhati at BT should
have a relation with the Moon's longitude at BT. The formula
is-
Remainder of(BTvikhatix 4)19 x 60= Moon's longitude
or its trines.
Uttarakalamrita by Ganaka Kalidasa supports this
method".
A method for rectifying the BT based on Khati-Vikhati of
birth is given in Uttara kalamrita. The same is given below-
